title: WE Selection Overlay
description: Make your WorldEdit selections visible, readable, and predictable.
body:
![weaddon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1592/332/worldedit_selection_overlay_300-png.png)

# WorldEdit Selection Overlay (Fabric) Make your WorldEdit selections visible, readable, and predictable. ![Overview](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1721/646/2026-06-05_18-56-31-png.png) ## What is this? WorldEdit Selection Overlay is a **client-side visual addon** that shows your selection **exactly as it is** before you run any destructive commands. No more guessing shapes. No more wrong sizes. No more accidental `//set air`. You see everything in advance. ## Why you actually need this WorldEdit gives you power, but **almost no visual feedback**. This mod fixes that: * See the real shape of your selection * Read dimensions directly in-game * Inspect blocks before editing * Isolate specific block types inside a selection * Avoid mistakes that cost time ## In-Game Preview ![Selection Overlay1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/93/sphere-png.png) ![Selection Overlay2](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/89/cyl-png.png) ![Selection Overlay1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/87/poly-png.png) ![Selection Overlay1](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1586/91/convex-png.png) The overlay renders your selection **directly in the world**: * Exact bounds * Real geometry * Clear corner points ## Built-in Dimension Ruler Measure selections like in CAD tools: * Clean readable size labels * Always visible from your current angle * Can follow your camera or stay fixed ## Overlay Palette Editor Customize how the overlay looks directly in-game: * Full-screen color editor with live selection preview * Per-element color, transparency, and line thickness * Ready-made presets for different visibility needs * Reset controls for one element, thickness, colors, or everything ![Selection Blocks Screen](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/1721/651/2026-06-07_12-22-07-png.png) ## Inspect Before You Edit Open the block viewer and see exactly what is inside: * All blocks in the selection, including `air` * Grouped and searchable * Fast filtering with `#air`, `#fluid`, and `#solid` * Chunk-aware loaded/unloaded counts * Fluid entries use bucket icons for easier reading Perfect before using: * `//replace` * `//set` * `//stack` ## Block Isolation Mode Need to find only one material inside a huge selection? Select one or more block types in the block viewer. The mod hides every other block inside the selected WorldEdit region **on the client only**, leaving the real world untouched. Useful for: * Finding hidden ores, liquids, air pockets, containers, or mistakes * Checking what a `//replace` command will affect * Inspecting complex builds layer by layer * Viewing selected blocks with their normal textures Details: * Multiple block types can be selected at the same time * Selected block groups stay pinned above the rest of the list * A reset button clears the isolation selection quickly * Fluids and fluid-like rendered content are hidden when they are not selected * Selected blocks and fluids are rendered full-bright so their textures stay readable * The selection boundary and ruler can stay visible while the internal grid is hidden * Works even when the normal selection overlay visibility is disabled Everything is visual only. Hidden blocks still exist, still collide, and are never changed by the mod. ## Features * Real-time selection overlay * Two render styles: **Blocky / Smooth** * Optional internal selection grid toggle * Full-screen palette editor with live preview * Custom colors, transparency, thickness, and presets * Adaptive performance for large selections * Optional diagonals for cuboid shapes * Built-in dimension ruler * Block inspection screen * Client-side block isolation mode * Fluid-aware rendering and bucket icons * Full-bright isolated blocks and fluids for readable textures * Fully configurable UI ## Supported Selection Types * Cuboid * Polygon 2D * Ellipsoid / Sphere * Cylinder * Polyhedron / Convex Works with everything WorldEdit sends via CUI. ## Controls | Key |Action | | --- |---------------------------- | | O |Open overlay settings | | B |Open block inspection screen | | N |Deselect | All keybinds are configurable. ## Compatibility * Singleplayer * Fabric + WorldEdit * LabyMod/LabyFabric when Fabric mods are enabled * Paper / Spigot / Purpur if WorldEdit CUI data is available * Sodium support for block and fluid isolation rendering If the server does not send CUI data or supported WorldEdit selection updates, the overlay cannot know what to render. ## Important * Client-side only, safe to install anywhere * Does not modify the world * Hidden blocks are only hidden visually * Recommended Minecraft GUI Scale: **2x** * Requires WorldEdit selection data ## Requirements * Minecraft **1.21.11** * Fabric Loader * Fabric API * WorldEdit ## Installation 1. Install Fabric Loader 2. Install Fabric API 3. Drop the mod into `/mods` 4. Launch the game ## Quick Start 1. Make a WorldEdit selection 2. Press `O` to configure the overlay 3. Use the palette button to customize colors and thickness 4. Press `B` to inspect blocks 5. Use the checkboxes in the block viewer to isolate specific blocks ## Troubleshooting * Make sure WorldEdit is installed * Make sure CUI is enabled when playing on servers that require it * Rejoin the world if the overlay does not appear * If using Sodium, restart the game after replacing the mod jar ## [Download WorldEdit](https://dev.bukkit.org/projects/worldedit) # Contact the developer: ngocchaub81@gmail.com
